name: RABBIT-SPEC-BACKLOG-1
title: impl-suggestion schema v1.0.0 has no owner/deprecation fields, violating Designed Deprecation philosophy
description: The impl-suggestion JSON schema (embedded in SKILL.md) has no owner, deprecation_criterion, or schema version lifecycle fields. This violates the 'Designed Deprecation' philosophy principle (every artifact has an explicit end-of-life criterion) and spec-rules.md lifecycle requirements. Add owner and deprecation_criterion to the schema or at minimum document them in spec.md.
